home.description: She Shapes Tech is the network for students at ZHAW School of Engineering. Networking, events and mutual support, because good connections change everything.
home.subtitle: She Shapes Tech connects students at ZHAW School of Engineering, because good connections change everything.

about.description: Learn more about the vision, mission and values of She Shapes Tech, a community of women for women in tech at ZHAW School of Engineering.
about.title: Who we are
about.home_desc: What makes She Shapes Tech and why you belong.
about.vision: A community where students at ZHAW SoE shape their place in tech with confidence — open, connected, and on equal terms.
about.mission: She Shapes Tech connects students at ZHAW School of Engineering and promotes collaboration among women in technical and engineering professions.

values.title: Community
values.desc: We create a space where you don't have to explain yourself. Just belong.

values.title: Visibility
values.desc: Presence, confidence, professional impact. These are skills you can train. We are the practice ground.

values.title: Career
values.desc: Connections from your studies stay with you throughout your career. We build this network early.

about.join_text: Want to look behind the scenes and actively shape things? We're looking for students who want to get involved according to your interests: co-organise events, help with the administrative side, or simply be part of it.
about.join_benefit: What you gain: real experience, a strong network, and exchange with women who think like you.

events.description: Events by She Shapes Tech: networking, workshops and talks for students at ZHAW School of Engineering.
events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Upcoming Events
events.empty_state: No upcoming events planned — check back soon!

list.subtitle: She Shapes Tech × SVIN
list.title: Ask Engineers – from Study to Industry
list.desc: Meet engineers from industry and ask your questions about careers, salaries, work-life balance and real experiences — open, honest, without taboos.

list.subtitle: She Shapes Tech × Zurich UAS Racing
list.title: She Shapes Formula Student – Workshop Tour, Lamination Workshop & Apéro
list.desc: Dive into the exciting world of Formula Student and get to know the team. In a hands-on workshop, you'll build carbon fibre parts for the next race car. Afterwards, enjoy an apéro and the chance to connect.
list.details: 12 spots only — first come, first served

sponsors.description: Our partners make She Shapes Tech possible. Together we empower women in technical professions at ZHAW School of Engineering.
sponsors.title: Partners
sponsors.subtitle: Our partners and supporters
sponsors.intro: We thank our partners who make She Shapes Tech possible.
sponsors.zhaw_desc: ZHAW School of Engineering — home and supporter of She Shapes Tech.
sponsors.svin_desc: Swiss Association of Women Engineers — connecting women in technical professions.
sponsors.funding_claim: A project from the «Sustainable Impact Program»

contact.description: Get in touch with She Shapes Tech — via Teams or Instagram. We'd love to hear from you.

contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you

datenschutz.description: Privacy policy of She Shapes Tech: what data we collect when you visit our website and how we process it.
datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.intro: This website is operated by She Shapes Tech. The protection of your personal data is important to us. This page explains what data is collected when you visit our website and how it is processed.
datenschutz.responsible: She Shapes Tech – c/o ZHAW School of Engineering, Technikumstrasse 9, 8400 Winterthur, Switzerland, sheshapestech.engineering@zhaw.ch
datenschutz.hosting: This website is hosted on Cloudflare Pages (Cloudflare Inc., 101 Townsend St, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA). When you access the website, technical access data is collected, including IP address, browser type, and time of access. She Shapes Tech has no control over this processing. Cloudflare's privacy policy applies.
datenschutz.fonts: This website uses Google Fonts. The fonts are loaded from servers operated by Google LLC (USA). Your IP address is transmitted to Google in this process. Legal basis: legitimate interest in the consistent display of the website (Art. 31 DSG). We plan to host Google Fonts locally in the future.
datenschutz.external: The website contains links to external services (Instagram, Microsoft Teams, Google Maps, Microsoft Forms). When you follow these links, you leave our website. She Shapes Tech has no control over their data practices. The privacy policies of the respective providers apply.
datenschutz.email: When you contact us by email, your message is stored in an email inbox provided by ZHAW School of Engineering for She Shapes Tech. Your data is used exclusively to process your inquiry.
datenschutz.rights: Under Swiss data protection law (DSG), you have the right to access your stored data and the right to correction and deletion. For requests, please contact: sheshapestech.engineering@zhaw.ch
